title: GitHub Copilot
description: Use GitHub Copilot responsibly and effectively — features across plans, data and architecture, prompt engineering, developer productivity, and privacy safeguards.
doc_title: GH-300 Study Guide (Community Edition) — GitHub Copilot
passing_note: GH-300 passes at 700/1000. Microsoft does not publish the raw-score mapping, so the readiness estimate below is unofficial and based on percent correct only.
